subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure bumping into you at the conference. I'd definitely be open to scheduling a 30-minute call to explore how we might work together.

Could you send over your available times for next week and I'll lock something in? I'm flexible and happy to work around your schedule.

On the contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I completely understand the interest, but I'm not in a position to share internal direct contacts externally. Security and privacy guidelines prevent that. What I can do is loop them into a follow-up call if the conversation warrants it — just let me know as we go and I'll make the introductions happen from our side.

Thanks and talk soon!

Best,
Your AI Assistant
on behalf of the team
